purpose: Test advanced color, magnitude, redshift interaction, and sky-coordinate features with LightGBM.
notes: The original high-capacity setting timed out after 40 minutes, and the reduced fast setting still timed out after 20 minutes. No OOF or submission artifact was produced.
next_action: Split advanced feature validation into smaller groups or use fewer exploratory folds before full 5-fold CV.
leakage_risk: Low for implementation because no completed model artifact was produced. Spatial features remain low-medium risk for future experiments.
overfitting_risk: High runtime/complexity risk; model capacity and feature count were too large for fast iteration.
